items.label: What are your store hours?
items.body: Most of our stores are open from 5:00 AM to 9:00 PM daily. Hours may vary by location. Use our store locator to find specific hours for your nearest store.

items.label: Do you offer dairy-free options?
items.body: Yes! We offer a variety of non-dairy milk alternatives including oat milk, almond milk, soy milk, and coconut milk. Ask your barista for details.

items.label: How does the Rewards program work?
items.body: Earn 2 Stars for every $1 you spend. Collect Stars to redeem free drinks, food, and merchandise. Join for free through our app or website.

items.label: Can I order ahead for pickup?
items.body: Absolutely! Use our mobile app or website to place your order and pick it up at your preferred store. Order ahead is available at participating locations.

items.imageAlt: A fresh espresso in a ceramic cup
items.title: Espresso
items.bodyHtml: Rich, full-bodied espresso made from our finest beans. The foundation of all our handcrafted beverages.

items.imageAlt: Cold brew coffee with ice in a tall glass
items.title: Cold Brew
items.bodyHtml: Slow-steeped for 20 hours, our smooth cold brew is the perfect refreshment for any time of day.

items.title: Matcha Latte
items.bodyHtml: Premium matcha green tea blended with steamed milk for a smooth, energizing drink.
